description_long: This object consists of a group of medium-sized, leafy shrubs with dense green foliage and scattered small red berries or flowers. The shrubs are arranged in a loose cluster, each with multiple slender stems branching outwards and supporting an abundance of oval-shaped leaves. The leaves are predominantly green, with some lighter and darker shades adding depth to the foliage. The red accents are distributed throughout the shrubs, providing a striking contrast against the green leaves. The overall form is bushy and irregular, with some stems standing more upright and others arching outward. The shrubs appear well-suited for use in urban parks, roadside plantings, or landscaped gardens.
description: A cluster of bushy green shrubs with oval leaves and scattered red berries or flowers, forming a dense, irregular group. The foliage is lush and the red accents stand out against the greenery.
description_view_0: A frontal view showing the full cluster of shrubs, highlighting the density of green leaves and the distribution of red berries or flowers.
description_view_1: A side-angled view revealing the depth and spacing between individual shrubs, with more visible gaps and the upright nature of some stems.
description_view_2: A rear view emphasizing the irregular arrangement and the arching branches, with the red accents still visible among the foliage.
description_view_3: A slightly rotated view similar to the front, showing the cluster's bushy form and the spread of leaves and red highlights.
